scene: Teen Byte sleeping peacefully in cozy bed during deep night, food bowl now critically low on kibble

subjects.position: centered in cozy bed on floor, nestled under soft blankets
subjects.action: sleeping peacefully with three light blue Z symbols floating scattered above head
